name: Genshin Stuff
description:
Just an open world which you can explore and talk to various characters. (This bot will not work well if you use anything with a memory below 16k tokens.) Update: Added all missing Fontaine characters.

WE'RE SO BACK!!! (Sorry about the 5 month hiatus 😭)

Planning to add: Natlan Characters as they release.

(Guide to getting the bot to work has been added)
Google docs share link for the guide: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1JE7NGB6E_0GVoy4NSjL1mRNNZxlz6DoiGMFbAmWZ3vk/edit?usp=sharing THIS BOT WILL NOT WORK WITH JANITORAI's LLM, PLEASE REFER TO THE GUIDE IN THE GOOGLE DOCS

Experimental Version of the Genshin Stuff bot is out! Still adding characters, it may take a long time since the character description is more complicated and descriptive than the current one. Please be patient, and check it out please! Thanks!
https://janitorai.com/characters/ea0271e1-9c42-4401-8cfd-68e27f62dfe7_character-genshin-stuff-experimental-version
